productDisplayName: Puma Men Wirko White Sports Shoes
description: Synthetic leather upper with contrast coloured synthetic overlays on the sides for durability and midfoot support Medial side overlay styled as brand's jumping cat to create a fashion statement Added overlay at the backfoot for durability and support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabricPU midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort and shock absorption collar for in-step comfort and snug fit Durable TPR outsole in herringbone pattern for absolute grip and traction Terraced grooves on the toe region for added grip Mildly curved forefoot for better traction Warranty: 3 months for manufacturing defects
